description: The assistant surfaces what needs your attention before you ask — a declined payment, a held deposit, an approaching fee — by watching your accounts across Core Banking, the Payments Engine, and Loan Servicing in real time.

Ask a plain-language question and get an instant, secure answer. Simple lookups like your balance come straight from your core banking record — no AI model involved and no account detail leaving Navy Federal's systems.

The assistant traces a problem past its surface symptom to the real cause — correlating the declined payment, the balance at the moment of the draw, and the unapplied salary credit into one clear explanation.

The assistant checks your account against Navy Federal's deposit-handling procedures and flags the exception: an early-credit flag with no matching direct deposit routing, which is why the funds are held rather than posted.

The assistant forecasts the outcome before you commit — showing that fixing the routing now posts the credit within one business day, funds the payment, and clears it inside the grace window, avoiding the fee.

With your go-ahead, the assistant executes the fix end to end: it adds the direct deposit routing, applies the held credit, and retries the payment automatically — then confirms each step as it completes.
The assistant closes the loop across your accounts — confirming next month draws from a funded account, projecting your posted balance, and reassuring you that nothing further is needed.
